message:
chore: sync temp-env dependency for env var testing

Another agent added temp-env crate to safely handle env var mutation
in tests without requiring unsafe blocks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -30,3 +30,4 @@ tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["json", "env-filter"], optio
 # For spike PTY tests
 portable-pty = "0.8"
 proptest = "1"
+temp-env = "0.3.6"
